fromAddress.description: Shared mailbox email address to send from (e.g., shared@yourdomain.com)

cc.description: Optional list of CC recipient email addresses

bcc.description: Optional list of BCC recipient email addresses

replyTo.description: Optional list of reply-to email addresses

saveToSentItems.description: Whether to save the message to Sent Items

attachments.description: Optional attachments: array of objects with name, contentType, contentBytes (base64)

configuration.subject: Test email from Azure shared mailbox
configuration.body:
Hello,

This is a test email sent via the Azure shared mailbox connector.
